creator: olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
text:
Hello,

While trying to compile libevent2 v2.0.22_1 with libressl-devel v2.5.1 in poudriere, I'm getting this error:
"****************************************************************************
===>   libevent2-2.0.22_1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.38 - not found
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/libevent2"



Looking here: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/security/libressl-devel/pkg-plist?revision=433035&view=markup#l78 it seems the new libressl-devel provides "libcrypto.so.41" instead of "libcrypto.so.38"


Best Regards.
